name: chain_acquisition_show_hn_added_api_key_sup
method: [ACQUISITION] Show HN: Added API key support to my AI writing assistant extension

stages.task: Scrape HN Show HN (last 90d) + Chrome Web Store category AI writing — extract extension names, install counts, pricing, whether BYOK supported
Score gaps: rank niches by (search volume proxy - existing extensions). Flag BYOK-missing and niche-missing combos. Output top 3 buildable gaps.
Generate Show HN post copy, 3 subreddit posts, and 3 tweets from the top gap finding. Route to CONTENT/social/posting_queue/.
